debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝⁴ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
G : Type u_1
inst✝³ : Infinite G
inst✝² : CommGroup G
inst✝¹ : TopologicalSpace G
inst✝ : CompactSpace G
f : G →ₜ* ℤ_[p]ˣ
hf : Function.Injective ⇑f
Δ : Subgroup G := Subgroup.comap f.toMonoidHom (PadicInt.torsionUnits p inst✝⁴)
hΔ₁ : Δ = CommGroup.torsion G
f₁ : G →ₜ* ↥(PadicInt.torsionfreeUnits p inst✝⁴) :=
  (ContinuousMonoidHom.fst ↥(PadicInt.torsionfreeUnits p inst✝⁴) ↥(PadicInt.torsionUnits p inst✝⁴)).comp
    ((↑(PadicInt.unitsContinuousEquivTorsionfreeProdTorsion p inst✝⁴)).comp f)
hΔ₂ : CommGroup.torsion G ≤ f₁.ker
f₂ : G ⧸ CommGroup.torsion G →ₜ* ↥(PadicInt.torsionfreeUnits p inst✝⁴) :=
  let __MonoidHom := QuotientGroup.lift (CommGroup.torsion G) (↑f₁) hΔ₂;
  { toMonoidHom := __MonoidHom, continuous_toFun := ⋯ }
⊢ Nonempty (G ⧸ CommGroup.torsion G ≃ₜ* Multiplicative ℤ_[p])
